summary: Completed testing of Nametag Editor and Admin PDF Download features for Printsout e-commerce app. All 7 backend API tests passed. Frontend tests verified: NameTagEditor page loads at /namnskylt/{productId}, shows correct badges (140 st/A4-ark, 30x13 mm, Självhäftande), Text tab allows entering name/phone/font/color, Motif tab has toggle/icons/upload button, Background tab has categories and color selection, live preview updates correctly, 'Lägg i kundvagn' button disabled until name entered. Admin 2FA login works, OrderDetailPanel shows 'Ladda ner namnlappar (PDF - 140 st A4)' button for nametag orders, PDF download endpoint returns valid PDF.

issues: Minor React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> in tbody - cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: NameTagEditor.js: Well-structured component with proper data-testid attributes for testing
NameTagEditor.js: Live preview correctly updates with name, font, motif, and background changes
NameTagEditor.js: 'Lägg i kundvagn' button correctly disabled when childName is empty
OrderDetailPanel.js: NametagCustomization component correctly displays all customization fields
OrderDetailPanel.js: PDF download button uses sessionStorage adminToken for authentication
nametag_pdf.py: Generates 140 stickers (7x20 grid) on A4 with proper dimensions (30x13mm)
server.py line 1471-1501: GET /api/admin/orders/{order_id}/nametag-pdf endpoint correctly validates order and nametag item
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test order with nametag customization
context_for_next_testing_agent: Nametag Editor and Admin PDF Download features fully tested. NameTagEditor at /namnskylt/{productId} allows customizing name tags with: Text (name, phone, font, color), Motif (toggle, icons, upload), Background (colors, gradients). Admin can download printable PDF (140 stickers on A4) via 'Ladda ner namnlappar (PDF - 140 st A4)' button in OrderDetailPanel. Test order 720d81c9-1ede-4414-9d6f-2d854dc94271 has nametag customization with Emma Svensson.

NameTagEditor Frontend.Text tab - name input: ✓ Can enter first name, last name, phone number
NameTagEditor Frontend.Motif tab - icons: ✓ Multiple categories (Populära, Djur, Natur, etc.) with icons
NameTagEditor Frontend.Live preview: ✓ Updates with name, font, motif, background changes
NameTagEditor Frontend.Add to cart button: ✓ Disabled until name entered, enabled after

Admin PDF Download.PDF button in UI: ✓ 'Ladda ner namnlappar (PDF - 140 st A4)' button visible in OrderDetailPanel
Admin PDF Download.Nametag customization display: ✓ Shows Förnamn, Efternamn, Telefon, Typsnitt, Typsnittsfärg, Motiv, Bakgrund

backend_api_tests.test_nametag_pdf_endpoint_exists: ✓ PASSED - Endpoint requires auth (401 without token)
backend_api_tests.test_nametag_pdf_download_with_auth: ✓ PASSED - Returns valid PDF with auth

frontend_ui_tests.Order detail with nametag: ✓ Shows customization details and PDF button
